{{Infobox character
| name = Regent
| aliases = Regent Loreli
| appears_in = The Elder Empire: Shadow, The Elder Empire: Sea
| titles = Regent
| abilities = Readers
| affiliations = Magister's Guild
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

''See also: [[Regent Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] are a group of powerful individuals who serve as representatives for [[the Emperor]]. Historically, they were personal companions to [[the Emperor]] and are considered his peers in strength; some, like [[Estyr]], are viewed as his equals. They function as the cornerstone of imperial agreements and are tasked with maintaining order among [[Guild Heads]]. Known to be formidable [[Readers]], they possess immense power that can be sensed by others and are capable of standing against [[the Emperor]] himself. The [[Regents]] typically remain in a state of rest until they are required to defend humanity against major threats, such as calamitous rebellions or the emergence of [[Great Elders]]. Several specific [[Regents]] are identified: [[Alagaeus]], the [[Regent of the East]]; [[Jorin Maze-walker]], the [[Regent of the South]]; and [[Loreli]], who holds roles as the [[Regent of the West]], the founder of the [[Luminian Order]], and a renowned strategist. [[Loreli]] is described as a visionary, healer, and warlord who has served as both an original [[Knight]] and [[Pilgrim]]. The [[Regents]] are also noted for their tendency to view common people as subjects in need of protection.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A [[Regent]] is mentioned as a potential target or subject of consideration.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|The [[Consultants]] are investigating the death of a [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c6">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|[[Benji]] and his group killed a [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c19">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|A [[Regent]] fought a [[Guild Head]].<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c21">''Of Darkness and Dawn'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Loreli]] is a [[Regent]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c5">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[Regent]] [[Loreli]] assisted the [[Magister]]'s [[Guild]] in making the crown's box.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c14">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|If the [[Regent]] finds [[Calder]], he might end up in a [[Palace cell]].<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c19">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|As one of the most powerful [[Readers]] to ever exist, the Regent is responsible for managing the business of [[Optasia]]. During a meeting with [[Bareius]] to request a report, [[Loreli]] is identified as a Regent alongside [[Estyr]]. Clad in silver-and-white [[Luminian armor]], [[Loreli]] is characterized by a hazy gray light that surrounds her presence.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Regents]] are among the most powerful [[Readers]] to ever walk the earth.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c19">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 19</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regent]] asked [[Bareius]] for a report.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c20">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regent]] is surrounded by a hazy gray light.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c23">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Regent]] [[Loreli]] wears silver-and-white [[Luminian armor]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|[[Loreli and Estyr]] are [[Regents]].<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[Regents]] handle [[Optasia]] business.<ref name="ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings-c27">''Of Killers and Kings'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|“One Regent,” she repeated aloud, considering.<ref name="ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn-c1" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Of Darkness and Dawn]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
